message:
refactor: extract shared e2e test helpers, tighten Chrome skip logic

Extracted loadStory, step, report, makeScriptedClient, withTimeout, and
isChromeUnavailable into test/e2e/helpers.ts. Replaced copy-pasted
helpers in all 4 e2e test files. Made isChromeUnavailable more specific
to avoid swallowing legitimate test failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
